** AI solutions & platforms · frontend engineering · React ecosystem **

AI focus

01

AI platform engineering

Building the frontend layers of AI products — from chat interfaces and prompt UIs to tool dashboards and streaming response rendering.

02

AI solution development

Translating AI capabilities into production-ready user-facing features. Bridging the gap between model APIs and the people who use them.

03

Micro frontend architecture

Designing and delivering scalable MFE systems for global products. One year as delivery architect on a cross-team micro frontend + microservice platform.

04

Lead & team enablement

Thriving as lead developer — guiding teams with empathy, facilitating structured decisions and helping engineers grow in the right direction.

AI · retroconcept

Commodore 64 Demo — 1984

A C64 demo powered by a 2MB small language model running locally on a cartridge — making the demo dynamic with an SLM.
